calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Broward County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Broward County Public Schools is Monday, August 10, 2026. BCPS begins in early August to complete 180 instructional days before late May while building in buffer days for hurricane closures and the three Jewish High Holiday no-school days in September and October that are not on neighboring district calendars.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Broward County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Broward County Public Schools in 2026-2027 is Friday, May 28, 2027 — eight days earlier than the 2025-2026 end date of June 5. This is one of the first years in recent BCPS history where the school year closes entirely in May. Summer camps and programs starting before June 1 are compatible with the 2026-2027 calendar; confirm start dates against the official end date before registering.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spring Break for Broward County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break for Broward County Public Schools in 2026-2027 runs Monday, March 22 through Friday, March 26, 2027 — five days. In 2026-2027, Broward's spring break aligns with Miami-Dade County Public Schools and Palm Beach County School District — all three South Florida counties on break simultaneously. This convergence concentrates demand from three large populations at once: FLL flights, Port Everglades cruise sailings, and Atlantic coast hotels typically reach peak pricing during this window. Easter 2027 falls April 4, just nine days after spring break ends, sustaining high demand into early April for families who extend their travel.

calendarFaqs.q: When are Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur no-school days in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: In 2026-2027, Broward County Public Schools observes three no-school days for the Jewish High Holidays: Rosh Hashanah on Tuesday, September 22 and Wednesday, September 23, 2026, and Yom Kippur on Thursday, October 1, 2026. All three are district-wide school closures. Miami-Dade County Public Schools and Palm Beach County School District do not observe these holidays as no-school days — families coordinating across South Florida districts should plan childcare specifically for September 22, 23, and October 1.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Winter Break for Broward County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break for Broward County Public Schools in 2026-2027 runs Monday, December 21, 2026 through Friday, January 1, 2027 — 12 days. Students return Tuesday, January 5, 2027; January 4 is an employee planning day with no school. Fort Lauderdale–Hollywood International Airport (FLL) typically sees some of its highest annual passenger volumes during the week before Winter Break and the days after New Year's — book holiday flights early once the calendar is confirmed.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days does BCPS have in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Broward County Public Schools has 180 instructional days and 196 total teacher work days in 2026-2027. The 16 additional teacher days cover pre-school-year planning, professional development sessions, and post-year activities. Florida law requires 180 student instructional days annually, which BCPS fulfills between August 10, 2026 and May 28, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: Ends Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: Last day is May 28 vs June 5 in 2025-2026 — the school year closes entirely in May for the first time in recent years. Summer camps and programs starting before June 1 can align with the 2026-2027 calendar without a schedule gap; confirm start dates before registering.

yearNumbers.label: South FL Aligned
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break aligns with Miami-Dade County Public Schools and Palm Beach County School District — all three South Florida county districts on break the same week. When all three align, FLL departures and coastal accommodations typically see higher demand than when districts break separately. Book travel early and check Miami-Dade and Palm Beach calendars directly, as alignment changes year to year.

calendarNotes:
Broward County Public Schools begins the 2026–2027 school year on Monday, August 10, 2026. Florida requires 180 student instructional days, and BCPS schedules an early August start to build in buffer days for hurricane-related closures while also absorbing the three September–October no-school days for the Jewish High Holidays that neighboring Miami-Dade and Palm Beach districts do not observe. The school year closes May 28, 2027 — eight days earlier than the 2025–2026 end date of June 5, and among the first years in recent BCPS history where the calendar closes entirely in May.

Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur are official no-school days in BCPS, and in 2026–2027 the closures fall September 22 (Tuesday), September 23 (Wednesday), and October 1 (Thursday). The September dates are the two-day Rosh Hashanah observance for Jewish year 5787; October 1 is Yom Kippur. All three are district-wide closures exclusive to BCPS — families who have previously lived in Miami-Dade or Palm Beach often don't anticipate these September and October no-school days until they review the official calendar. Note also that November 10 is a no-school employee planning day; combined with Veterans Day on November 11, students have two consecutive no-school days that week.

Spring Break 2026–2027 runs March 22–26, and in this school year Broward's break aligns with Miami-Dade County Public Schools and Palm Beach County School District simultaneously. This convergence is not automatic — the three districts set their calendars independently, and their spring break windows diverge in many years. When all three align, FLL departures, Port Everglades cruise sailings, and South Florida Atlantic beach hotels typically see higher demand than in years when the districts break separately. Easter 2027 falls April 4, just nine days after BCPS's spring break ends March 26, which can sustain elevated demand into early April for families traveling after the official break.

Thanksgiving Break 2026–2027 is the full school week: Monday, November 23 through Friday, November 27. BCPS observes five consecutive no-school days for Thanksgiving. There is no separate fall break in October; the full Thanksgiving week is the only extended break between the August start and Winter Break. Students return Monday, November 30, 2026.

Winter Break runs December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027 — 12 days. Students return January 5, 2027; January 4 is an employee planning day. An additional employee planning day on February 16 — the day after Presidents Day (February 15) — means students have no school Saturday February 13 through Tuesday February 17, a four-day mid-year stretch that families should note when planning February activities or travel.
